news.t: Top ETFs To Buy This Week Amid Stimulus Uncertainty
Short-Seller Jim Chanos Buys Small-Cap, China ETFs and Tesla

holdings.infoBox: IJS is an equity ETF with a total of 478 individual holdings. The top holdings are Molina Healthcare stock at N/A, Match Group at N/A, Eastman Chemical Company at N/A, CarMax at N/A, and Victoria's Secret & Co. at N/A.

overview.description: The iShares S&P Small-Cap 600 Value ETF (IJS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Small Cap 600 Value index. The fund tracks an index of small-cap US stocks. The index uses three factors to select value firms from the S&P 600. IJS was launched on Jul 24, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.
